title: Frame Metadata Extractor Payload
description: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for the output of the frame-metadata-extractor VAST DataEngine function. Covers every supported still-frame format (OpenEXR, DPX, Cineon, TIFF, PNG, TGA, HDR/RGBE, JPEG2000). See FRAMES_METADATA_SCHEMA.MD for field-level prose and sample payloads.

schema_version.description: Output schema version. Bumped when field semantics change.

parts.description: One entry per subimage. Single entry for most formats, multiple for multi-part EXR.

channels.description: Flat list of channels across all parts. Use part_index to re-associate.

aovs.description: Renderer-meaningful AOV groupings derived from channels (beauty, diffuse, AO, depth, normals, cryptomatte, light groups). One entry per AOV per part per view. Non-EXR formats emit one synthetic beauty row.

errors.description: Non-fatal parse errors. Empty on the happy path.

timestamp.description: Only set on early-return error payloads (_error_result); normal successful runs put timing info in extraction.timestamp.

FileBlock.description: Identity and physical attributes of the frame file.

path.description: Canonical path — VAST view path (elementpath) when available, otherwise the S3 object key.

size_bytes.description: Total file size from the S3 Content-Range header, not the range read.

mtime.description: Last-modified timestamp in ISO-8601 (may be empty string on older event payloads).

frame_number.description: Parsed from filename regex [._](\d{3,8})\.<ext>$. Null if the filename is not numbered.

multipart_count.description: Number of subimages. 1 for single-part formats.

is_deep.description: EXR deep-scanline/tile flag. Always false for non-EXR formats.

Part.description: Per-subimage geometry and encoding. Optional fields are omitted when null — the inspector strips None values before emitting.

multi_view.description: EXR multiView attribute; may be a string, list of strings, or boolean depending on OIIO version.

Box2i.description: Serialized OIIO window/box — integer pixel rectangle.

layer_name.description: Portion before the last '.'. Empty string for flat channels.

component_name.description: Portion after the last '.'. Equal to name for flat channels.

type.description: OIIO TypeDesc upper-cased. Commonly HALF, FLOAT, UINT8, UINT16, UINT32.

Aov.description: Renderer-meaningful AOV grouping. Channels with the same (part_index, name, view) are collapsed into one record. Cryptomatte ranks roll up into a single record with `ranks: N`.

view.description: EXR view name (e.g. 'left', 'right' for stereo); null when not part of a multi-view file.

components.description: Canonicalized component order (R,G,B,A; X,Y,Z; U,V) — not EXR's alphabetical storage order.

channel_group.description: UI label: RGBA / RGB / XYZ / UV / Z / R / single component / +-joined fallback.

data_type.description: Dominant pixel type (HALF / FLOAT / UINT8 / UINT16 / UINT32). Equal to 'MIXED' if components have heterogeneous types.

is_data.description: True for non-color AOVs (data / crypto / matte / deep). Viewers should not apply view transforms to these.

color_space.description: 'raw' for data AOVs; otherwise inherits the part's color_space attribute.

light_group.description: Suffix from <base>_<group> AOV names (e.g. 'diffuse_key' yields light_group: 'key'). Null otherwise.

synthetic.description: True for non-EXR formats with implicit single beauty AOV (DPX, TIFF, PNG, TGA, HDR, JPEG2000, Cineon).

uncompressed_bytes.description: Per-frame logical size: pixels × channels × bytes_per_channel, honoring per-channel subsampling. Per-AOV compressed bytes are not knowable from EXR headers and are deliberately not pretended.

pct_of_frame_logical.description: This AOV's share of the frame's total uncompressed footprint, as a percentage. Sum across AOVs lands at 99.9-100.1 due to rounding.

ranks.description: Cryptomatte rank count. Only present on category: 'crypto' rows.

AttributesBag.description: Raw attribute bag, one list per part. For DPX, SMPTE 268M fields parsed by dpx_header.py are appended under the 'dpx:' prefix.

type.description: OIIO TypeDesc upper-cased (e.g. STRING, INT, FLOAT, V2F, FLOAT[8], TIMECODE, UINT8[N]).

value.description: JSON-normalized attribute value. Binary attributes use {encoding:'base64', data:'<b64>'}.

ColorBlock.description: Normalized color information derived from the richest attribute source available. Absent keys mean the field could not be derived.

primaries.description: CIE xy chromaticities; typically an 8-element list for RGB+white or a string label.

icc_profile_hash.description: Reserved — hex or base64 digest of an embedded ICC profile when present.

TimecodeBlock.description: SMPTE timecode when available. For EXR it comes from smpte:TimeCode (may be an object); for DPX it is a decoded HH:MM:SS:FF string.

SequenceBlock.description: Sequence-level identifiers. frame_number mirrors file.frame_number when present.

CameraBlock.description: Camera metadata, populated for formats carrying EXIF (TIFF, JPEG2000) or DPX input-device fields.

ProductionBlock.description: Production-side identifiers. Fields are populated when the format exposes them.

PersistenceBlock.description: Populated by vast_db_persistence.persist_to_vast_database after the handler builds its payload.
